text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 58 

CRNRY_CARE_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Coronary Care Charge Amount ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for coronary care accommodations related to a 
beneficiary's stay. 

SHORT NAME: CRNRYAMT 

LONG NAME: CRNRY_CARE_CHRG_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the revenue center total charge amount
